title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 06 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 06 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 06 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 06/03/2026
Today DCE iron ore futures trended firmer , though prices retreated slightly in the final hour of trading. The most-traded I2605 contractultimately closed at 772 RMB/tonne, an increase of 1.38% from the previous trading session. Spot market prices followed suit, rising by 10-15 RMB from the prior day.
